summary: A talking-head PSA for National Child Abuse Prevention Month in which an HSI unit chief speaks to camera about the agency's work combating child exploitation, bookended by simple text cards ('We are working to keep kids safe') over a blue wood-plank background. It is a straightforward spoken informational/PSA interview, not a music-driven cinematic or genre piece, so it does not fit youth-appeal produced content.
notable_text: WE ARE WORKING TO KEEP KIDS SAFE; NATIONAL CHILD ABUSE PREVENTION MONTH; TOGETHER, WE CAN KEEP OUR KIDS SAFE; HSI IS COMMITTED TO PROTECTING
